creator: sergey@blender.org
text:
That's weird.

Version of py-sqlparse in trunk is 0.2.2, and in 2016Q4 (where the issue happens) it's still 0.1.6. So you're somewhere between this two versions.

Just to clarify: the issue happens in current 2016Q4. So guess it's perhaps either matter of porting newer port to Q4 or considering the Q4 to be inconsistent and broken and wait for 2017Q1.
